name: Cauliflower with Potatoes & Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a karahi (wok) over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onions and fry for 3-4 minutes until light brown.
3. Add the potatoes and cauliflower, stirring. Include the turmeric, chilli powder, cumin, tomatoes, salt, and sugar. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the peas, cover, and reduce heat to medium-low. Cook for about 20 minutes until the potatoes and cauliflower are tender. During cooking, stir the vegetables a few times to prevent them from sticking.
5. Sprinkle with garam masala.
TNT: Imran C.
